title: Add BOOK TO GAME to games
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [BOOK TO GAME](https://gelfer1979.itch.io/book-to-game) to games
- Convert book formats (txt, mobi, epub, docx, fb2) into gamebooks using cloud AI (web/mobile) and local AI via LMSTUDIO or llama; default uses polination AI. Web version does not save game state.

Fixes #12189

gist.headline: From Books to Gamebooks
gist.blurb: A new community app just dropped! 'BOOK TO GAME' turns your favorite e-books into interactive text adventures using Pollinations AI.
gist.summary: Added 'BOOK TO GAME' to the community apps directory, a tool that converts standard book formats (txt, mobi, epub, docx, fb2) into interactive gamebooks using Pollinations AI by default.
gist.impact: Users can now discover a community-built tool that transforms their static e-books into playable, AI-driven text adventures.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about converting books into games. Visuals should include books, a retro game console or computer, and the Pollinations bee. The bee could be feeding a book into a magical retro computer that displays a game on its screen.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, placing a glowing book into a retro computer console that is displaying a text adventure game on its CRT screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny wizard hat, placing a glowing book into a retro computer console that is displaying a text adventure game on its CRT screen. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
